message:
test(proptest): add 26 property tests for output renderers and workflow runner/lock/context

- proptest_output_renderers.rs (11 tests): serde roundtrips for RuleListItem,
  RuleTestMatch, RuleDetail, HealthDiagnosticStatus, AnalyticsSummaryData;
  structural invariants for as_str/serde consistency, nonempty IDs, confidence
  range, nonnegative values
- proptest_workflows_runner_lock_context.rs (15 tests): serde roundtrips for
  WorkflowStartResult, WorkflowExecutionResult, PaneLockInfo, WorkflowConfig;
  helper method contracts (is_started, is_locked, is_completed, is_aborted,
  execution_id), type tag serialization, default safety invariants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
